texto: Mohammad never assigned himself a status more than a common man and a messenger of God. People had faith in him when he was surrounded by poverty and adversity and trusted him while he was the ruler of a great Empire. He was a man of spotless character who always had confidence in himself and in God's help. No aspect of his life remained hidden nor was his death a mysterious event.
explicacao: Citação de M.H. Hyndman sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Mohammad never assigned himself a status more than a common man and a messenger of God. People ha…” articula fe, adversity, atheist em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como luto e atheist.
